login_page.title: Welcome
login_page.error_fallback: Login failed. Please try again later.

register.empty_fields: Please enter your email and password.
register.error_fallback: Registration failed. Please check your network or whether the email is already in use.

network_errors.error_400: Bad Request: Invalid parameters or syntax.
network_errors.error_401: Unauthorized: Authentication failed or token expired.
network_errors.error_403: Forbidden: No permission to access this resource.
network_errors.error_404: Not Found: The requested resource does not exist.
network_errors.error_413: Payload Too Large: Uploaded data exceeds server limit.
network_errors.error_422: Unprocessable Entity: Data format is correct but validation failed.
network_errors.error_500: Internal Server Error: Backend server exception.
network_errors.error_503: Service Unavailable: Backend service is down or under maintenance.
network_errors.error_timeout: Connection Timeout: Network request or response timed out.
network_errors.error_connection: Connection Error: Unable to connect to server, please check your network.
network_errors.error_cancel: Request Cancelled: The request was cancelled by the client.
network_errors.error_unknown: Unknown Error: An unknown network or system exception occurred.
network_errors.error_no_auth: Authentication Error: Please log in again.
